mission_title: Kayock Writer V2 — Calm Guided Interface Cleanup

argv:
exec('from pathlib import Path

files = [
    Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py"),
    Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\VERIFY_KAYOCK_WRITER_V2.py"),
]
for path in files:
    compile(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), str(path), "exec")
print("KAYOCK_WRITER_V2_SOURCE_COMPILE_OK")')
